Future Software Engineer

About Me

I'm a senior in high school heading to Marquette University to study Software Engineering, majoring in Computer Science. I already have my Microsoft IT help desk certification.

My Interests

  • Video games
    • Roblox
    • Brawlhalla

My Goals

I want to become a software engineer and work in tech. I'm starting to learn coding before college so I can hit the ground running at Marquette.
